one_time_description: Allowance for uncollectible deposit of $2,303,417 related to deposit paid for modular homes not delivered; lawsuit filed for reimbursement
economic_notes: Investments in Quilakwa Investments Ltd. (convenience store and gas station), Splatsin Development Corporation, 1468652 B.C. Ltd., and Yucwmenlucwu (Caretakers of the Land) 2007 LLP (forestry). BCFN Gaming revenue. Forestry Consulting and Revenue Sharing Agreement generating $4.5M. Defined contribution pension plan with $150,544 in contributions.
notes: Splatsin is located in BC. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Quilakwa Investments Ltd. (100%), Splatsin Development Corporation (100%), and Yucwmenlucwu (Caretakers of the Land) 2007 LLP (99%). 1468652 B.C. Ltd. (100%) appears consolidated. Significant CMHC deferred revenue of $1,596,128 recognized in 2024 (prior year balance was $1,586,933). Large deposit written off ($2,303,417) for undelivered modular homes with litigation pending. FNFA long-term debt of ~$13M due June 2024 — likely subject to refinancing. New PS 3400 Revenue standard adopted April 1, 2023 prospectively. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $16,461,260 + FNHA $1,589,383 + Province of BC $1,439,138 + CMHC $1,597,830 = $21,087,511. OSR = $32,469,745 - $21,087,511 = $11,382,234. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text.
